messages.content: You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How can I view my test results on My Health Online?
You can view your test results on My Health Online, which are typically released within 4 days of completion.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How do I request a coverage determination?
You can request a coverage determination through My Health Online by going to Coverage > Request Determination, or by calling 1-855-315-5800.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How do I log in to My Health Online?
You can log in to My Health Online by visiting myhealthonline.acmehealth.org and entering the email address and password you created at registration.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How can I find out the price of my medication?
You can check the price of a specific medication via My Health Online by going to Pharmacy > Price Check, or you can ask the Member Services assistant.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How much do I pay for a primary care visit with the Gold plan?
With the Gold plan, you pay $0 for a primary care visit.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Are there any medications that I can't order through mail?
Yes, controlled substances, biologics, and refrigerated specialty medications are not eligible for mail order and must be picked up in person.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
When will I receive my bill?
You will receive your bill by the 10th of each month.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What should I do if I get locked out after too many failed attempts?

If you get locked out after three failed identity verification attempts, your call will be transferred to a human Member Services representative who can help verify your identity through other methods.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How can I schedule an appointment with my doctor?
You can schedule, reschedule, or cancel appointments through My Health Online or by calling your local Acme clinic directly.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Can you tell me about my pharmacy benefits?
Sure! Your pharmacy benefits are part of the services we offer to help you manage your medications and access necessary prescriptions.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How long does it take to hear back about financial assistance?
Applications for financial assistance are reviewed within 30 days.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
I have a question about my plan coverage, who can I ask?
You can ask us here at Member Services, and we'll provide you with the information you need regarding your plan coverage.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
If I have a question about my bill, when can I call?
You can call our Billing department Monday through Friday, from 8 AM to 5 PM PT at 1-855-398-1593, option 4.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What happens if I enter the wrong password too many times?
If you enter the wrong password 5 times, your account will be locked for 15 minutes. You can also call 1-866-978-8837 to unlock it immediately after verifying your identity.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What do I need to transfer my prescription from another pharmacy?
To transfer your prescription, you need to provide the drug name, current pharmacy name, current pharmacy phone number, and prescription number.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What if I have a different insurance plan?
Acme accepts most major insurance plans, but you should verify that your specific plan covers the Acme facility you plan to visit by calling the number on your insurance card.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What if I lose access to my two-factor authentication device?
If you lose access to your 2FA device, you'll need to call 1-866-978-8837 and complete identity verification to reset your two-factor authentication.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How can I stop the call from being recorded?
If you'd like to opt out of recording, just say, 'please stop recording this call,' and we'll stop recording immediately.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What are the costs for a specialist visit under the Silver plan?
Under the Silver plan, a specialist visit costs $50.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What can I do if I can't pay my bill on time?
If you can't pay your bill by the due date of the 25th, a $25 late fee will apply after 30 days, and balances unpaid after 90 days may be sent to collections.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What do I do if I need care on the weekend?
You can visit Acme Walk-In Care, which is available daily from 7 AM to 10 PM. You can find it through My Health Online.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How do I pay my bill?
You can pay your bill online via My Health Online, by phone at 1-855-398-1593, by mail, or you can set up autopay from your bank account or credit card.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How can I verify my identity when I call Member Services?
To verify your identity, you'll need to provide your full legal name, date of birth, and either your Member ID or ZIP code on file.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What should I do if I forget my password?

If you forget your password, you can reset it through the My Health Online portal. Make sure your new password is at least 10 characters long and includes one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What happens if I get married? Can I change my health plan?
Yes, getting married is a qualifying life event that triggers a 60-day Special Enrollment Period, during which you can change your plan.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Can I get telehealth services with my Acme Health Plus plan?
Yes, all Acme Health Plus plans include telehealth at no additional cost.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Can I access My Health Online any time?
Yes, My Health Online is available 24/7 at myhealthonline.acmehealth.org.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How can I get help with My Health Online?
You can get help with My Health Online by calling our Tech Support at 1-866-978-8837, which is available 24/7.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What kind of services does Acme Health provide?
Acme Health is a not-for-profit integrated health network that serves Northern California, offering a variety of health services including pharmacy benefits, appointments, and plan coverage.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
When can I enroll in a Acme Health Plus plan?
Open enrollment runs from October 15 to December 7 each year, and coverage begins on January 1 of the following year.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How do I find a doctor in my area?
You can search for in-network providers by specialty, zip code, language spoken, and whether they are accepting new patients using the My Health Online provider directory.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What number do I call if I need help with my membership?
You can reach Member Services anytime at 1-855-398-1593. We're available 24/7 to assist you.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What if I need to cancel my appointment last minute?
If you cancel your appointment less than 24 hours in advance, you may incur a $50 missed appointment fee for non-emergency visits.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Can you tell me if my prescription is ready without verifying my identity?
I'm sorry, but I can't discuss any member-specific information like prescriptions without first verifying your identity.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What are the pharmacy hours?
Our pharmacy is open from 7 AM to 10 PM PT. You can reach them by calling 1-855-398-1593 and selecting option 2.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What happens if I need to change my appointment?
If you need to change your appointment, you can contact us directly, and we'll be happy to assist you in rescheduling.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Can I use my phone for two-factor authentication?
Yes, you can use your phone for two-factor authentication. Supported methods include SMS text code, Microsoft Authenticator, Google Authenticator, and Authy.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What happens if I can't remember my Member ID when I call?
If you can't remember your Member ID, you can provide your ZIP code on file instead, and that will help verify your identity.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What do I do if I have trouble logging into My Health Online?
If you're having trouble logging into My Health Online, please reach out to our support team, and we'll help you get back in.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Can I get help with my medical bills if I don't have insurance?
Yes, Acme offers financial assistance to uninsured and underinsured patients with income up to 400% of the federal poverty level. You can apply online or by calling 1-855-398-1593.
